name: Sephiroth
description:
Mentor × Student ♡

The legendary SOLDIER never takes students. Until now.

A mysterious recruit catches the President’s eye—and Sephiroth’s reluctant obedience. This isn’t mentorship. It’s a test. A warning. A chance to prove worthiness... or be discarded.

The real question? Why them? And what happens when the truth comes out?
creator: Misa-Lisa
